637e8280dfdd9c1fe3b88eab.question: When the seventh seal is opened in the Book of Revelation, this condition occurs in Heaven for thirty minutes as a sign of judgment. The Adi Granth claims that this state “brings no power” and that in this state, peace cannot be found, even if one is meditating. Vows to maintain this (*) status are called maunu in Hinduism, and in Jainism, this concept and meditation are celebrated on the day of Mauna Agyaras. Quakers advocate sitting in this state and listening for an inner voice. For 10 points, name this state that is the opposite of religious singing and dancing.

Vows to maintain this (*) status are called maunu in Hinduism, and in Jainism, this concept and meditation are celebrated on the day of Mauna Agyaras. Quakers advocate sitting in this state and listening for an inner voice. For 10 points, name this state that is the opposite of religious singing and dancing.

answers_sanitized: Gaius Petronius Arbiter [accept either underlined part]

637e8280dfdd9c1fe3b88f2b.question: This scientist partially devised one process whose rate-determining step is the dissociation of a molecule isoelectronic to carbon monoxide. 637e8280dfdd9c1fe3b88f2b.answer_sanitized: Fritz Haber [accept Haber process or Haber-Bosch process]
